name: Dispute resolution
window_name: Resolution of arbitration disputes — trials by MRZ LEGAL.
meta_description: We resolute disputes in arbitration cases. Classic legal practice in economic justice.

blocks.text_main:
We take your case and handle it. Defending your business and personal assets.

If the facts are properly established, the law cannot delay its course, yet it will delay for the person lacking integrity.

In traditional commercial disputes involving contracts made in ongoing business operations, the process is straightforward. A creditor shall demonstrate their right to request a debtor to fulfill their obligation and consideration made. Conversely, a debtor must prove that they have fulfilled their obligation in a satisfactory manner.

Therefore, courts will not have doubts regarding the legitimacy and validity of the plaintiff’s claim in a common business transaction conducted with a clear purpose in accordance with civil law, especially if it follows the typical format and is of a market nature.

Unitized contracts involving expensive assets, especially in the domain of investments, are ineffective in this view. Such contracts have the potential to conceal discrepancies in interest between the parties or be manipulated by participants to obtain unjustified tax advantages and leverage over external creditors.

Law is an artificial construct that governs the conduct of individuals, both in their personal capacity and on behalf of legal entities. While a court cannot directly change an individual’s actions, it does possess the power to revoke their rights.

Should the misuse of the right be evident and proven in the case, either the court will refuse to safeguard the creditor’s defense or it will render the transaction invalid in favour of a genuine individual by declaring the absence of a right.

These complex legal evaluations consume the court’s time, and that is all we need to clarify the non-obvious or, on the contrary, to prevail in any level of dispute.
